headline: 6 core bridge infrastructure contracts on Ethereum mainnet with documented deployments and multiple security audits

findings.text: Official deployments documented: L1 token bridge at 0x051F1D88f0aF5763fB888eC4378b4D8B29ea3319, L1 Message Service at 0xd19d4B5d358258f05D7B411E21A1460D11B0876F, L1 Security Council safe at 0x892bb7EeD71efB060ab90140e7825d8127991DD3

Multiple audits documented: OpenZeppelin Linea Bridge Audit (Nov 2023), ConsenSys Diligence Message Service & Rollup Audit (Jun 2023), ConsenSys Diligence Canonical Token Bridge Audit (Jun 2023), Cyfrin audit (May 2024), ConsenSys Diligence Rollup Update differential audit (Jul 2024), ConsenSys Diligence Contracts Update audit (Jan 2024)
GitHub monorepo at https://github.com/Consensys/linea-monorepo contains contracts directory with bridge implementation code, licensed under Apache 2.0 and MIT
6 addresses catalogued with roles: 1 rollup contract, 1 message service, 1 token bridge, and 1 security council multisig on Ethereum mainnet

rationale.verdict: Walked official docs, GitHub monorepo, and security audit reports to discover 6 bridge-related contracts on Ethereum with clear deployment documentation, audited security history, and identified governance structures.

evidence.shows: Official Linea documentation listing deployed contracts including L1 Token bridge (0x051F1D88f0aF5763fB888eC4378b4D8B29ea3319), LineaRollup (0xd19d4B5d358258f05D7B411E21A1460D11B0876F), and L1 Security Council safe (0x892bb7EeD71efB060ab90140e7825d8127991DD3) with Etherscan links
OpenZeppelin security audit of Linea Bridge published November 3, 2023, covering TokenBridge and message service contracts with detailed scope and vulnerability findings
Principal Linea repository containing smart contracts for bridge core functions, with subfolders for contracts/, coordinator/, prover/, and postman/, licensed under Apache 2.0 and MIT
Official documentation describing canonical token bridge as pair of lock & mint contracts relying on message service for cross-chain interactions
User-facing bridge documentation referencing native bridge for technical operators and the official Linea bridge UI at linea.build/hub/bridge/

unknowns: X-cleanup: model emitted grade="unknown" with empty unknowns[] — see verdict for details

protocol_metadata.about: Linea Bridge is the canonical token bridge enabling ERC-20 transfers between Ethereum L1 and Linea L2 via a lock-and-mint mechanism. The bridge operates through paired contracts on both chains that rely on the Linea Message Service for cross-chain messaging and finality. Governance is administered by the Linea Security Council multisig on Ethereum.
